creator: root@misha.privatelabs.com
text:
Besides upgrade,  I now attempt to  solve the name-clash
	between the port's  wordprocessor (/usr/X11R6/bin/pw and
	the system's pw(8) (/usr/sbin/pw).  Please, let me know,
	if I missed something...

Fix: In addition to this patch, the shar-ball of the new port
	is available at
		http://virtual-estates.net/siag-.port.shar
